testcase.name: Listar todos los empleados con sus datos
Lista vacia de empleados

error.message: javascript error: ng.markDirty is not a function (Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.167) Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.6.114.1-microsoft-standard-WSL2', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [800d622324bc75e54cad1600e9e46e0f, executeScript {args=[], script=var el = document.querySelector('app-empleados');var comp = ng.getComponent(el);comp.empleados.set([]);comp.cargando.set(false);ng.markDirty(comp);}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.167, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.167 (65db666ac2c..., userDataDir: /tmp/org.chromium.Chromium....}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:44197}, goog:processID: 15624, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:44197/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.167, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 800d622324bc75e54cad1600e9e46e0f Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.6.114.1-microsoft-standard-WSL2', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: driver.version: unknown

testcase.name: Acceso denegado para roles no autorizados al modulo de empleados
